defs: Furniture or outfit, whether useful or ornamental; especially, the furniture and supplies of a vessel, fitting her for a voyage or for warlike purposes, or the furniture and necessaries of an army, a body of troops, or a single soldier, including whatever is necessary for efficient service; equipments; accouterments; habiliments; attire.
quotes: Did their exercises on horseback with noble equipage.
First strip off all her equipage of Pride.

defs: A carriage of state or of pleasure with all that accompanies it, as horses, liveried servants, etc., a showy turn-out.
quotes: The rumbling equipages of fashion . . . were unknown in the settlement of New Amsterdam.
